title: RUIXUE 30 pieces Foil trays With Lids,Aluminium Foil trays 1750ml/700ml/410ml/10pcs each,Reusable Foil Baking Trays,For Cooking,Roasting,Baking,Frying. (1750-700-410ML/10PCS)
features: High Quality Foil Trays With Lids: Our Aluminium Foil Trays with lids are made of high quality food grade aluminium foil, which is non-toxic and odourless. They can withstand the high temperatures of the oven and contribute to even heating and long-term insulation of the food. These foil dishes are disposable and recyclable.

Excellent thermal conductivity: Foil Containers with Lids have excellent thermal conductivity and even heat distribution. Thanks to our super heat-conductive film, it will evenly distribute the right amount of heat for perfect cooking and fresh results. (Please keep the temperature below 600°C)

Package contents: The package contains 30 foil trays with lids with 30 cardboard aluminium lids. Each Foil Containers measures 25 x 19 x 6cm and 1750ml 10pcs, 18 x 13 x 5cm and 700ml 10pcs,17x 11 x 4cm and 410ml 10pcs. enough for your different baking needs. The stackable design is easy to store and carry without taking up too much space.

Multi-purpose foil container with lids: The foil dishes with lids can be used not only for grilling, cooking and reheating food, but also for food packaging, grilling, cakes, fruit and vegetables, and refrigerated storage. Disposable foil trays for baking are safe for cooking over charcoal, in the oven or over an open fire. (Not for use in microwave ovens)

Excellent service: we are always striving to provide our dear customers with the best possible service and product quality. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. We will provide you with a perfect and satisfactory solution.
